commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: God himself testifies that the Holy Spirit presides over his blessings, saying, “I will put my Spirit on your seed and my blessings on your children.” For no blessing can be full except through the inspiration of the Holy Spirit. - "On the Holy Spirit 1.7.89"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Stock. I will give fresh life to my people, as to the figure of Christ's Church.
